---
title: "Characteristics of the Gods of Greece. A Manual for Schoolgirls"
---

## Characteristics of the Gods of Greece. A Manual for Schoolgirls

**Author:** Ellen J. Millington
**Date:** 1867
**Imprint:** Bristol: Chilcott

### Notes

See also [[person:1000]Ellen Millington].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
